# Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] **Docs**: if this PR changes the public API (exports, hook signatures, client methods, config, defaults, errors), the SDK pages in [ACTA-docs](https://github.com/ACTA-Team/ACTA-docs) and this repo's `README.md` were updated (or a follow-up issue is linked)
- [ ] Breaking changes are called out in the PR description and CHANGELOG
